categories.label: Essential
categories.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.

items.name: __cf_bm
items.purpose: Bot management and traffic integrity protection

categories.label: Functional
categories.description: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization.

items.name: intercom-id-*
items.purpose: Persist chat session preferences and user context

items.name: locale
items.purpose: Remember your language and region preferences

categories.label: Analytics/Performance
categories.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

items.name: _ga
items.purpose: Visitor measurement with anonymized IP addresses

items.name: _gat
items.purpose: Throttle request rate to analytics servers

categories.label: Advertising/Marketing
categories.description: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners.

items.name: _gcl_au
items.purpose: Store and track conversions from Google Ads
